title: santolina neapolitana f. semivirescens
intro: Santolina neapolitana f. semivirescens is a perennial shrubby plant, also known as lavender cotton or Italian gray lavender, belonging to the Asteraceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The plant's health benefits include soothing digestive issues, reducing anxiety and stress, and promoting skin health due to its antiseptic and antifungal properties. Santolina neapolitana f. semivirescens can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a versatile and valuable addition to herbal remedies.
